vocab.meaning: tiếng cười khàn, ồn ào và náo nhiệt
vocab.example: On weekends, the silence of the night is often broken by the raucous laughter of patrons leaving the nearby pub.

vocab.meaning: tiếng kêu o o hoặc tiếng ù ù kéo dài không dứt
vocab.example: There is a persistent drone from the ventilation system in my office that makes it difficult to concentrate at times.

vocab.meaning: một mớ âm thanh hỗn độn của còi xe
vocab.example: During rush hour, the street below my window erupts into a deafening cacophony of car horns.
I find the gentle rustle of leaves in the park a welcome respite from the mechanical noises of the city.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn xâm lấn, gây khó chịu
vocab.example: The most intrusive noise I encounter is the sound of heavy drilling from the apartment renovation next door.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bíp bíp lúc có lúc không
vocab.example: The intermittent beeping of a truck reversing nearby is a constant feature of my morning routine.

vocab.meaning: tiếng chim hót líu lo, du dương
vocab.example: At the crack of dawn, the melodic chirping of birds in the garden provides a very tranquil start to my day.

vocab.meaning: sự dội lại của âm thanh bị bóp nghẹt (tiếng vang đục)
vocab.example: Even with the windows closed, I can feel the muffled reverberation of the bass from the nightclub across the street.

vocab.meaning: tiếng gót giày gõ lạch cạch trên sàn
vocab.example: The rhythmic clatter of heels on the tiled hallway is a sound I’ve grown very accustomed to in my workplace.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ù ù lan tỏa của dòng xe cộ
vocab.example: The pervasive hum of traffic from the nearby motorway acts as a constant background soundtrack to my life.
